channel.title: Drivers on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Drivers on ExitCode0

item.title: [FIXED] Bose Bluetooth headphones with Windows 10
item.description: Fix Bose Bluetooth audio quality and microphone feedback loop on Windows 10. Switch from the generic Bluetooth driver to Microsoft A2DP Source for high-fidelity audio.

item.title: AWUS036AC (rtl8812au) driver setup in Kali Linux
item.description: Install Alfa AWUS036AC (rtl8812au) wireless adapter drivers on Kali Linux for monitor mode and packet injection. Aircrack-ng compatible with manual dkms build method.
